Gene R. Browning
Assistant Registrar of Voters
County of Venfura
Hall of Administration, Lower plaza
800 S. Victoria Avenue
Ventura, CA 93009
Attn: Virginia Bloom
Election Services Coordinator
Ventura County Elections Division
Re
Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. .4.-06-099
Dear Mr. Browning:
This letter is- in response to your request on behalf of the Ventura County
Elections Division for advice regarding the campaign provisions of the political Reform
Act (the'Act').r
QUESTION
May the first pre-election campaign statement in connection with the county,s
August 22,2006, recall election, covering the period through July 8, 20o6,be combined
with the semi-annual statement?
CONCLUSION
Candidates and committees involved in the election may file a combined statement
that will satisff the requirement to file the semi-annual statement on July3l, 2006. This
combined statement will be filed on July 13, 2006, covering the period iuroury 7,2006,
through July 8, 2006.
I Government Code sections 81000 - gl}l4. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
es9


Our File No. 4-06-099
Page2
T,ACTS
The County of Ventura will be conducting arecall election on August 22,2006
ANALYSIS
During an election, candidates and committees involved in the election are
required to file two campaign statements disclosing contributions received and
expenditures made in connection with that election. These preelection campaign
statements are generally filed 40 days before the election and again 12 daysbefore the
election. (Section 84200.8.) Semi-annual statements are filed iunuury 3l and July 31,
respectively. (Section 84200.)
There is a mechanism in the Act that permits the combining of statements when
an overlapping reporting period occurs, or the filing of the semi-annual statement would
be an additional, unnecessary filing to the two preelection statements. (Section 54205.)
In this case, filing the two preelection statements in connection with an August 22,20(;6,
election will satisfr the semi-annual filing requirement.
A campaign statement filing schedule which outlines the due dates for filing
statements in connection with the election is enclosed for your convenience.
If I may be of any fuither assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916)
322-s660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel
